failed_attempts:
norm_cast at h₁
  let P := 1979; have : Fact P.Prime := ⟨by norm_num⟩
  let F := ZMod P
  let I := Finset.Icc 1 1319
  let S := ∑ k in I, (-1 : ℚ)^(k+1) / k
  
  -- Calculate sum in ZMod P
  have h_sum_zero : (∑ k in I, (-1 : F)^(k+1) * (k : F)⁻¹) = 0 := by
    -- Algebraic identity: Alternating harmonic sum = sum of second half
    let J := Finset.Icc 660 1319
    have h_ident : ∑ k in I, (-1 : F)^(k+1) * k⁻¹ = ∑ k in J, k⁻¹ := by
      let E := I.filter Even; let O := I.filter Odd
      have h_split : ∑ k in I, (-1 : F)^(k+1) * k⁻¹ = ∑ k in O, k⁻¹ - ∑ k in E, k⁻¹ := by
        rw [← Finset.sum_filter_add_sum_filter_not I Even]; simp [Finset.filter_not_even_eq_filter_odd]
        congr 1
        · apply Finset.sum_congr rfl; intro x hx; simp at hx; rw [Nat.odd_iff_not_even] at hx; simp [hx.2]
        · apply Finset.sum_congr rfl; intro x hx; simp at hx; simp [hx.2]; ring
      have h_even : ∑ k in E, (k : F)⁻¹ = 2⁻¹ * ∑ k in Finset.Icc 1 659, (k : F)⁻¹ := by
        rw [← Finset.sum_bij (fun x _ => 2 * x) (fun x hx => by 
          simp at hx ⊢; constructor; omega; simp [Nat.even_iff])]
        · intro x hx; field_simp; ring
        · intro a1 a2 _ _ h; linarith
        · intro b hb; simp at hb; use b / 2; simp
          constructor; constructor <;> try omega
          rw [← Nat.dvd_iff_mod_eq_zero] at hb; exact Nat.mul_div_cancel' hb.2
      have h_total : ∑ k in O, (k : F)⁻¹ = (∑ k in I, (k : F)⁻¹) - 2⁻¹ * ∑ k in Finset.Icc 1 659, (k : F)⁻¹ := by
         rw [← Finset.sum_filter_add_sum_filter_not I Even (fun x => (x:F)⁻¹), Finset.filter_not_even_eq_filter_odd, h_even]
         abel
      rw [h_split, h_total]; ring_nf
      -- We have sum(1..1319) - sum(1..659) = sum(660..1319)
      have h_decomp : ∑ k in I, (k : F)⁻¹ = ∑ k in Finset.Icc 1 659, (k : F)⁻¹ + ∑ k in J, (k : F)⁻¹ :=
        Finset.sum_Icc_add_sum_Icc (by norm_num) (by norm_num)
      rw [h_decomp]; ring
    rw [h_ident]
    -- Symmetry argument with involution x -> P - x
    apply Finset.sum_involution (fun k _ ↦ P - k)
    · intro x hx; simp at hx ⊢; omega
    · intro x _ _; simp [P]; ring_nf; simp; field_simp
    · intro x _; omega
    · intro x hx; simp at hx; omega
  
  -- Link to rationals
  have h_cast : (S.num : F) = 0 := by
    rw [← Rat.cast_eq_zero (K:=F)]
    -- Cast of sum
    have h_cast_sum : (S : F) = ∑ k in I, (-1 : F)^(k+1) * k⁻¹ := by
      rw [Rat.cast_sum]; apply Finset.sum_congr rfl; intro x hx
      rw [Rat.cast_div, Rat.cast_pow, Rat.cast_neg, Rat.cast_one, Rat.cast_natCast]
      rw [ZMod.nat_cast_zmod_eq_zero_iff_dvd]; intro h
      simp at hx; have := Nat.Prime.dvd_of_dvd_pow (by norm_num) h; omega
    rw [h_cast_sum, h_sum_zero]
  
  -- Divisibility
  rw [ZMod.nat_cast_zmod_eq_zero_iff_dvd] at h_cast
  have h_eq : p * S.den = q * S.num := by rw [← Rat.eq_iff_mul_eq_mul, ← h₁]; rfl
  apply Nat.Prime.dvd_of_dvd_pow (by norm_num)
  rw [← mul_dvd_mul_iff_right h₀]
  refine dvd_mul_of_dvd_right h_cast _
  rw [h_eq, mul_comm]; exact dvd_mul_right _ _
